description_long: This object appears to be a highly distorted and elongated representation of an adult pedestrian, with exaggeratedly stretched limbs and torso. The head is human-like and proportionate, but the body and legs are unnaturally extended and twisted, creating a surreal, almost ribbon-like form. The figure seems to be wearing a long-sleeved upper garment and pants, with visible shoes on the feet. The overall structure is thin and sinewy, with the limbs and torso blending into each other in a continuous, warped fashion. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, with clear demarcations between the clothing and skin areas. The asset gives the impression of a glitched or abstracted human figure, rather than a realistic pedestrian.
description: A surreal, elongated adult pedestrian figure with stretched limbs and a twisted, ribbon-like body, wearing long-sleeved clothing and shoes. The head is proportionate, but the rest of the body is highly distorted and abstract.
description_view_0: The head and upper torso are visible, with the limbs stretched and twisted below; the face is clearly seen.
description_view_1: The side view emphasizes the extreme elongation and twisting of the lower body and legs, with the feet visible at the bottom.
description_view_2: The back of the head and the full extent of the stretched limbs are visible, showing the continuous, ribbon-like form.
description_view_3: The head is in profile, and the twisted, elongated torso and legs are prominent, with the feet pointing outward.
attribute_posture: unnaturally elongated and twisted, with limbs extended
